sources.title: Ambrogio: The First Vampire | 2025 Gothic Horror Romance | Vampire Love Movie
sources.description:
Ambrogio: The First Vampire | 2025 Gothic Horror Romance | Vampire Love Movie

A millennium old Vampire encounters a woman who resembles his long lost love. As well as dealing with a long time enemy, bent on revenge.

2025.  Stars: Simon Shih, Gianlucca Gazzo, Ford Nelson

metadata.Plot: When the first vampire encounters a woman who resembles his lost love, he calls upon the gods to shield her from rivals hellbent on revenge.
metadata.Writer: Alex Javo, Taz Lake, Johnny Ray Jr.
